name: Chronic stress-induced apoptosis is mitigated by young mitochondria transplantation in the prefrontal cortex of aged rats
short_name: Young mitochondria aged rat PFC stress study
summary: An aged-rat study testing intracerebroventricular fresh mitochondria from young rats in aged male rats exposed to chronic stress, with prefrontal-cortex oxidative-stress and apoptosis endpoints.
venue: Iranian Journal of Basic Medical Sciences
